de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.translation

      SLExpression translate(SLTranslationExceptionManager excManager, Object... params)
      Add implicit "non-null" and "created" guards for reference types, "in-bounds" guards for integer types.
      abstract Term translateBoundedNumericalQuantifier(QuantifiableVariable qv, Term lo, Term hi, Term body)
      Creates a term for a bounded numerical quantifier (e.g., sum).

      • lowerBound

        private Term lowerBound(Term a,
              LogicVariable lv)
        Extracts lower bound from a if it matches the pattern.
        Parameters:
        a - guard to be disected
        lv - variable bound by quantifier
        Returns:
        lower bound term (or null)

      • upperBound

        private Term upperBound(Term a,
              LogicVariable lv)
        Extracts upper bound from a if it matches the pattern.
        Parameters:
        a - guard to be disected
        lv - variable bound by quantifier
        Returns:
        upper bound term (or null)

      • translate

        public SLExpression translate(SLTranslationExceptionManager excManager,
                     Object... params)
                       throws SLTranslationException
        Description copied from class: JMLTranslator.JMLQuantifierTranslationMethod
        Add implicit "non-null" and "created" guards for reference types, "in-bounds" guards for integer types. Then, translateToTerm the quantifier.
        Specified by:
        translate in interface JMLTranslationMethod
        Overrides:
        translate in class JMLTranslator.JMLQuantifierTranslationMethod
        Throws:
        SLTranslationException
